notes: Prioritize coding-agent compatibility, tool use, latency, and long-context behavior.
If using Claude Code through a GLM gateway, verify the endpoint with verify-glm.
Prioritize retrieval quality, Chinese document handling, data governance, and cost per query.
Prioritize stability, controllability, knowledge-base grounding, and escalation workflow.
Prioritize long-context handling, citation, and hallucination control.
Prioritize terminology consistency, style control, and review workflow.
Prioritize tool execution, Python/SQL ability, and data privacy.
Prioritize integration with existing tools, permission boundaries, and user training.
